requirement_topic.en: Motor Nameplate and Marking Requirements for Vietnam Market
requirement_topic.zh: 越南市场电动机铭牌和标识要求
requirement_topic.zht: 越南市場電動機銘牌和標識要求

summary.en: Motors placed on the Vietnam market must carry nameplates compliant with TCVN standards (aligned with IEC 60034-1) disclosing: rated voltage (380/220 V, 3-phase, 50 Hz for Vietnam grid), rated power (kW), rated speed (rpm), efficiency class (IE level), insulation class, protection degree (IP rating), and manufacturer details. In addition, the MOIT mandatory energy label (showing the IE efficiency class) must be affixed to the motor. All markings must be legible and durable. Nameplates in Chinese only are not acceptable — Vietnamese-language labelling or bilingual labels including Vietnamese are required for products marketed in Vietnam.
summary.zh: 在越南市场销售的电动机铭牌须符合TCVN标准（与IEC 60034-1对齐），标注：额定电压（越南电网380/220V、三相、50Hz）、额定功率（kW）、额定转速（rpm）、效率等级（IE级别）、绝缘等级、防护等级（IP等级）和制造商信息。此外，须粘贴工贸部强制能效标签（标注IE效率等级）。所有标识须清晰且耐久。仅有中文铭牌不被接受——在越南市场销售的产品须提供越南文标识或包含越南文的双语标签。
summary.zht: 在越南市場銷售的電動機銘牌須符合TCVN標準（與IEC 60034-1對齊），標注：額定電壓（越南電網380/220V、三相、50Hz）、額定功率（kW）、額定轉速（rpm）、效率等級（IE級別）、絕緣等級、防護等級（IP等級）和製造商信息。此外，須粘貼工貿部強制能效標籤（標注IE效率等級）。所有標識須清晰且耐久。僅有中文銘牌不被接受——在越南市場銷售的產品須提供越南文標識或包含越南文的雙語標籤。

standards_or_laws: TCVN / IEC 60034-1 (nameplate and marking requirements for rotating electrical machines)
MOIT mandatory energy label (IE class, affixed to motor)

summary.en: Chinese motors are marked per GB/T 755 and GB 18613-2020 requirements, which require nameplate disclosure of rated voltage, power, speed, efficiency class, insulation class, and IP rating aligned with IEC 60034-1. Chinese-language nameplates are standard for the domestic market. For export to Vietnam, Chinese-only nameplates must be supplemented with Vietnamese-language markings or bilingual labels. The efficiency class marking must be consistent with the MOIT energy label certificate obtained for Vietnam.
summary.zh: 中国电动机按GB/T 755和GB 18613-2020要求进行标注，须在铭牌上标注额定电压、功率、转速、效率等级、绝缘等级和IP等级，与IEC 60034-1对齐。国内市场标准使用中文铭牌。出口越南时，仅有中文铭牌须补充越南文标识或双语标签。效率等级标注须与取得的越南工贸部能效标签证书一致。
summary.zht: 中國電動機按GB/T 755和GB 18613-2020要求進行標注，須在銘牌上標注額定電壓、功率、轉速、效率等級、絕緣等級和IP等級，與IEC 60034-1對齊。國內市場標準使用中文銘牌。出口越南時，僅有中文銘牌須補充越南文標識或雙語標籤。效率等級標注須與取得的越南工貿部能效標籤證書一致。

gap.en: Chinese domestic nameplates (Chinese language only) are not sufficient for Vietnam market placement. Vietnamese-language labelling or bilingual labels including Vietnamese are required. The efficiency class shown on the nameplate must match the MOIT energy label certificate for the specific motor model. Exporters must plan for relabelling or bilingual nameplate production for Vietnam-destined motors. The MOIT energy label is a separate physical label in addition to the nameplate.
gap.zh: 中国国内铭牌（仅中文）不足以满足越南市场销售要求。须提供越南文标识或包含越南文的双语标签。铭牌上标注的效率等级须与该电动机型号取得的越南工贸部能效标签证书一致。出口商须为出口越南的电动机计划重新标签或生产双语铭牌。工贸部能效标签是铭牌之外另需粘贴的独立实物标签。
gap.zht: 中國國內銘牌（僅中文）不足以滿足越南市場銷售要求。須提供越南文標識或包含越南文的雙語標籤。銘牌上標注的效率等級須與該電動機型號取得的越南工貿部能效標籤證書一致。出口商須為出口越南的電動機計劃重新標籤或生產雙語銘牌。工貿部能效標籤是銘牌之外另需粘貼的獨立實物標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TCVN/IEC 60034-1 compliant nameplate + MOIT energy label required; Vietnamese-language marking required for Vietnam market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 755 + GB 18613-2020 nameplate requirements for China domestic market; Chinese-language; not sufficient for Vietnam export without localisation

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese domestic nameplates do not satisfy Vietnam labelling requirements. Motors exported to Vietnam require Vietnamese-language or bilingual nameplates, plus the MOIT energy label physically affixed to the motor. Exporters should plan nameplate localisation as part of the Vietnam market entry process. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国国内铭牌不满足越南标识要求。出口越南的电动机须配备越南文或双语铭牌，并在电动机上实物粘贴工贸部能效标签。出口商应将铭牌本地化纳入越南市场准入流程规划。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國國內銘牌不滿足越南標識要求。出口越南的電動機須配備越南文或雙語銘牌，並在電動機上實物粘貼工貿部能效標籤。出口商應將銘牌本地化納入越南市場准入流程規劃。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Compatibility and Installation Safety — 380/220 V, 50 Hz alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 电网兼容性与安装安全 — 380/220V、50 Hz一致性
requirement_topic.zht: 電網相容性與安裝安全 — 380/220V、50 Hz一致性

summary.en: Vietnam's three-phase industrial power grid operates at 380/220 V (line-to-line / line-to-neutral), 50 Hz, which is identical to China's standard three-phase supply. Motors imported for Vietnam must be rated for 380 V (delta) or 380/220 V (star/delta) at 50 Hz. Installation and electrical safety follow Vietnam's National Electrical Code (QCVN 01:2020/BCT on electrical installation safety) and IEC-aligned TCVN standards. Grounding (earthing) and protective conductor requirements follow IEC 60364 as adopted by TCVN. No voltage adaptation or frequency conversion is required for standard Chinese three-phase motors.
summary.zh: 越南工业三相电网运行电压为380/220V（线间/线-中性线），频率50Hz，与中国标准三相供电完全相同。进口越南的电动机须额定380V（三角接法）或380/220V（星/三角接法），频率50Hz。安装和电气安全遵循越南国家电气规范（QCVN 01:2020/BCT，电气装置安全）及TCVN采用的IEC标准。接地和保护导体要求遵循TCVN采用的IEC 60364。标准中国三相电动机无需电压适配或变频。
summary.zht: 越南工業三相電網運行電壓為380/220V（線間/線-中性線），頻率50Hz，與中國標準三相供電完全相同。進口越南的電動機須額定380V（三角接法）或380/220V（星/三角接法），頻率50Hz。安裝和電氣安全遵循越南國家電氣規範（QCVN 01:2020/BCT，電氣裝置安全）及TCVN採用的IEC標準。接地和保護導體要求遵循TCVN採用的IEC 60364。標準中國三相電動機無需電壓適配或變頻。

standards_or_laws: QCVN 01:2020/BCT (Vietnam National Technical Regulation on Electrical Installation Safety)
TCVN / IEC 60364 (electrical installations — earthing, protective conductors)

summary.en: China's three-phase industrial grid is 380/220 V, 50 Hz — identical to Vietnam. Standard Chinese three-phase induction motors designed for the China domestic market are rated for 380 V, 50 Hz and are electrically compatible with the Vietnam grid without modification. GB/T 755, GB 12665, and installation standards GB 50055 (Motor Installation Design Specification) govern installation safety in China. IEC 60364 alignment is strong in both countries, minimising installation safety technical divergence.
summary.zh: 中国三相工业电网为380/220V、50Hz，与越南完全相同。针对中国国内市场设计的标准中国三相感应电动机额定电压为380V、50Hz，与越南电网电气兼容，无需改装。中国的安装安全由GB/T 755、GB 12665和安装标准GB 50055（电动机安装设计规范）管理。两国均与IEC 60364高度对齐，安装安全技术差异极小。
summary.zht: 中國三相工業電網為380/220V、50Hz，與越南完全相同。針對中國國內市場設計的標準中國三相感應電動機額定電壓為380V、50Hz，與越南電網電氣相容，無需改裝。中國的安裝安全由GB/T 755、GB 12665和安裝標準GB 50055（電動機安裝設計規範）管理。兩國均與IEC 60364高度對齊，安裝安全技術差異極小。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 755 (IEC 60034-1 aligned — voltage and frequency ratings)

gap.en: There is no voltage or frequency technical gap between China and Vietnam for standard three-phase industrial motors. Both grids are 380/220 V, 50 Hz. Chinese motors designed for the domestic market require no electrical modification for Vietnam deployment. The only gap in this area is procedural: installation must comply with Vietnam's QCVN 01:2020/BCT and local electrical codes rather than China's GB 50055, and inspections are conducted by Vietnam authorities, not Chinese ones.
gap.zh: 标准三相工业电动机在中越之间不存在电压或频率技术差距。两国电网均为380/220V、50Hz。针对中国国内市场设计的中国电动机在越南部署时无需任何电气改装。本领域唯一差距属程序性：安装须符合越南QCVN 01:2020/BCT和当地电气规范，而非中国的GB 50055，且由越南当局而非中国当局进行检查。
gap.zht: 標準三相工業電動機在中越之間不存在電壓或頻率技術差距。兩國電網均為380/220V、50Hz。針對中國國內市場設計的中國電動機在越南部署時無需任何電氣改裝。本領域唯一差距屬程序性：安裝須符合越南QCVN 01:2020/BCT和當地電氣規範，而非中國的GB 50055，且由越南當局而非中國當局進行檢查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory installation baseline — QCVN 01:2020/BCT and TCVN/IEC 60364 earthing; no voltage/frequency adaptation required for standard Chinese motors
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 50055 installation standard; 380 V 50 Hz grid identical to Vietnam; no adaptation needed

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade (MOIT), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese three-phase motors rated 380/220 V, 50 Hz are electrically compatible with the Vietnam grid without modification. Installation must comply with Vietnam QCVN 01:2020/BCT electrical safety requirements rather than Chinese standards. There is no voltage or frequency technical barrier for this product category. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 额定380/220V、50Hz的标准中国三相电动机与越南电网电气兼容，无需改装。安装须符合越南QCVN 01:2020/BCT电气安全要求，而非中国标准。本产品类别不存在电压或频率技术壁垒。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 額定380/220V、50Hz的標準中國三相電動機與越南電網電氣相容，無需改裝。安裝須符合越南QCVN 01:2020/BCT電氣安全要求，而非中國標準。本產品類別不存在電壓或頻率技術壁壘。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
